name: vercel-security-dashboard
description: Local-first dashboard that inventories Vercel project environment variables, attributes them to likely third-party services, and supports controlled rotation via the Vercel REST API.

scripts.test: node --test --import tsx --test-reporter=spec tests/domain/classifier.test.ts tests/domain/target.test.ts tests/infrastructure/crypto.test.ts tests/infrastructure/passphrase.test.ts tests/infrastructure/atomic-write.test.ts tests/infrastructure/file-credential-store.test.ts tests/infrastructure/vendor-rule-source.test.ts tests/infrastructure/vercel-mappers.test.ts tests/application/rotate-binding.test.ts tests/interface/origin-guard.test.ts tests/interface/throttle.test.ts
